label: SIMULATED backtest history — validation only, not live results
method: No look-ahead; signals use only past data. Real 10bps transaction costs. Chronological in-sample (65%) / out-of-sample (35%) split. Equities benchmarked against an equal-weight basket of the SAME (survivorship-biased) universe, so outperformance reflects selection skill, not survivorship.

strategies.name: Equity momentum (position, top 20%, monthly + vol-target 15%)
strategies.note: Vol-targeting cut drawdown from -31% to -19% while improving risk-adjusted return. Vol target is a tunable risk dial.

strategies.name: Equity momentum (position, top 20%, monthly, no risk overlay)
strategies.note: Beats equal-weight-same-universe (Sharpe 0.87). Return scales smoothly with rank concentration — signature of a real signal.

strategies.name: Short-term momentum continuation (swing, weekly)
strategies.note: Mean-reversion ('buy the dip') was tested and FAILED (Sharpe 0.14); continuation works.

strategies.name: Crypto vol-targeted sleeve
strategies.note: Vol-targeting cut drawdown from -87% to -59% and improved out-of-sample return. Still very high risk. No selection edge was found in crypto.
